Public dataset analysis - Richards 2021¶

Preliminaries¶

In [1]:
import os
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import scipy
import matplotlib
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
In [2]:
data_folder = "data"
figure_folder = "figures"
In [3]:
sc.set_figure_params(frameon=False)
sc.settings.verbosity = 3
In [4]:
matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype'] = 42
matplotlib.rcParams['svg.fonttype'] = "none"

Read dataset¶

In [5]:
adata = sc.read(os.path.join(data_folder, "richards_2021.h5ad"))
adata
Out[5]:
AnnData object with n_obs × n_vars = 79862 × 20288
    obs: 'Sample.ID', 'Patient.ID', 'Sample.Type', 'nGene', 'nUMI', 'percent.mito', 'S.Score', 'G2M.Score', 'Phase', 'Developmental_AUC', 'InjuryResponse_AUC', 'Neftel_MES2_AUC', 'Neftel_MES1_AUC', 'Neftel_AC_AUC', 'Neftel_OPC_AUC', 'Neftel_NPC1_AUC', 'Neftel_NPC2_AUC', 'Neftel_G1.S_AUC', 'Neftel_G2.M_AUC', 'Verhaak_TCGA_GBM_NEURAL_AUC', 'Verhaak_TCGA_GBM_PRONEURAL_AUC', 'Verhaak_TCGA_GBM_MESENCHYMAL_AUC', 'Verhaak_TCGA_GBM_CLASSICAL_AUC', 'Cahoy_astrocyte_AUC', 'Cahoy_oligodendrocyte_AUC', 'Cahoy_neuron_AUC', 'Cahoy_astro_young_AUC', 'Cahoy_astro_mature_AUC', 'Cahoy_OPC_AUC', 'Cahoy_OL_myel_AUC', 'Cahoy_MOG_pos_AUC', 'Cahoy_astro_in_vivo_AUC', 'Cahoy_cultured_astroglia_AUC', 'Liddelow_A1_ReactiveAstrocytes_AUC', 'Liddelow_A2_ReactiveAstrocytes_AUC'
    uns: 'Patient.ID_colors', 'Sample.ID_colors', 'Sample.Type_colors'
    obsm: 'X_pca'
In [6]:
sc.pl.embedding(adata, basis="X_pca", color=['Sample.Type', 'nGene', 'nUMI', 'Phase', 'Developmental_AUC', 'InjuryResponse_AUC'], 
                ncols=2, wspace=0.4, save="_richards_2021_original_annotation.svg")

WARNING: saving figure to file figures/X_pca_richards_2021_original_annotation.svg

Import signatures from the GeoMX DEA¶

In [7]:
elongated_vs_rest = pd.read_excel(os.path.join(data_folder, "elongated_vs_rest_degs.xlsx"), index_col=0)
elongated_upreg_genes = elongated_vs_rest[(elongated_vs_rest.padj < 0.05) & (elongated_vs_rest.log2FoldChange > 0)].index.tolist()
len(elongated_upreg_genes)
Out[7]:
376
In [8]:
multipolar_vs_rest = pd.read_excel(os.path.join(data_folder, "multipolar_vs_rest_degs.xlsx"), index_col=0)
multipolar_upreg_genes = multipolar_vs_rest[(multipolar_vs_rest.padj < 0.05) & (multipolar_vs_rest.log2FoldChange > 0)].index.tolist()
len(multipolar_upreg_genes)
Out[8]:
199
In [9]:
nonpolar_vs_rest = pd.read_excel(os.path.join(data_folder, "nonpolar_vs_rest_degs.xlsx"), index_col=0)
nonpolar_dowreg_genes = nonpolar_vs_rest[(nonpolar_vs_rest.padj < 0.05) & (nonpolar_vs_rest.log2FoldChange < 0)].index.tolist()
len(nonpolar_dowreg_genes)
Out[9]:
376

Compute gene scores for the GeoMX DEGS¶

In [10]:
sc.tl.score_genes(adata, elongated_upreg_genes, score_name='elongated_upreg')

computing score 'elongated_upreg'
WARNING: genes are not in var_names and ignored: Index(['UPK3BL1', 'ATP5MC3', 'BUD23', 'TCEAL9', 'SEPTIN7', 'DIO3', 'GATD1',
       'H1-4', 'RACK1', 'BEX3', 'REX1BD', 'H4C8', 'H2AZ1', 'ITPRID2',
       'NIPSNAP2', 'GDF1', 'ATP5PD', 'H2AZ2', 'SEPTIN11', 'SEPTIN2', 'NECTIN3',
       'ATP5F1A', 'H4C12', 'MICOS13', 'IL24', 'TLE5', 'H4C4', 'H2BC5'],
      dtype='object')
    finished: added
    'elongated_upreg', score of gene set (adata.obs).
    795 total control genes are used. (0:00:04)
In [11]:
sc.tl.score_genes(adata, multipolar_upreg_genes, score_name='multipolar_upreg')

computing score 'multipolar_upreg'
WARNING: genes are not in var_names and ignored: Index(['YARS1', 'PPIAL4A', 'SEPTIN7', 'H2AC20', 'H1-3', 'GATD1', 'H1-4',
       'RACK1', 'H4C8', 'ITPRID2', 'NIPSNAP2', 'ATP5PD', 'DDX4', 'H4C12',
       'MICOS13', 'SEM1', 'SNHG32'],
      dtype='object')
    finished: added
    'multipolar_upreg', score of gene set (adata.obs).
    644 total control genes are used. (0:00:04)
In [12]:
sc.tl.score_genes(adata, nonpolar_dowreg_genes, score_name='nonpolar_downreg')

computing score 'nonpolar_downreg'
WARNING: genes are not in var_names and ignored: Index(['UPK3BL1', 'ATP5MC3', 'BUD23', 'TCEAL9', 'SEPTIN7', 'DIO3', 'GATD1',
       'H1-4', 'RACK1', 'BEX3', 'REX1BD', 'H4C8', 'H2AZ1', 'ITPRID2',
       'NIPSNAP2', 'GDF1', 'ATP5PD', 'H2AZ2', 'SEPTIN11', 'SEPTIN2', 'NECTIN3',
       'ATP5F1A', 'H4C12', 'MICOS13', 'IL24', 'TLE5', 'H4C4', 'H2BC5'],
      dtype='object')
    finished: added
    'nonpolar_downreg', score of gene set (adata.obs).
    795 total control genes are used. (0:00:04)
In [13]:
sc.pl.embedding(adata, basis="X_pca", color=['elongated_upreg', 'multipolar_upreg', 'nonpolar_downreg'], 
                ncols=1, wspace=0.4, vmin="p10", vmax="p90", save="_richards_2021_geomx_signatures.svg")

WARNING: saving figure to file figures/X_pca_richards_2021_geomx_signatures.svg
In [14]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5, 5))
sc.pl.violin(adata, 'elongated_upreg', groupby='Sample.Type', jitter=False, ax=ax, rotation=90)
In [15]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5, 5))
sc.pl.violin(adata, 'multipolar_upreg', groupby='Sample.Type', jitter=False, ax=ax, rotation=90)
In [16]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5, 5))
sc.pl.violin(adata, 'nonpolar_downreg', groupby='Sample.Type', jitter=False, ax=ax, rotation=90)

SOX+ NES+ cells signature from bulk RNAseq¶

In [17]:
degs = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(data_folder, "deseq2_toptable.sox2_nes_positive_vs_negative.txt"), comment="#", sep="\t")
sox2_pos_nes_pos_signature = degs[(degs['log2FoldChange'] > 0) & (degs['padj'] < 0.1)].gene_name.tolist()
len(sox2_pos_nes_pos_signature)
Out[17]:
36
In [18]:
sc.tl.score_genes(adata, sox2_pos_nes_pos_signature, score_name='sox2_pos_nes_pos_score')

computing score 'sox2_pos_nes_pos_score'
WARNING: genes are not in var_names and ignored: Index(['ENSG00000287001', 'H3C2', 'ENSG00000288953', 'ENSG00000290960',
       'ENSG00000279294', 'H2AC21', 'KNL1'],
      dtype='object')
    finished: added
    'sox2_pos_nes_pos_score', score of gene set (adata.obs).
    651 total control genes are used. (0:00:04)
In [20]:
sc.pl.embedding(adata, basis="X_pca", color=['sox2_pos_nes_pos_score',], ncols=3, wspace=0.4, vmax="p99",
               save="_richards_2021_sox2_pos_nes_pos_score.svg")

WARNING: saving figure to file figures/X_pca_richards_2021_sox2_pos_nes_pos_score.svg
In [21]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5, 5))
sc.pl.violin(adata, 'sox2_pos_nes_pos_score', groupby='Sample.Type', jitter=False, ax=ax, rotation=90)
In [22]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5, 5))
sc.pl.violin(adata, 'sox2_pos_nes_pos_score', groupby='Phase', jitter=False, ax=ax, rotation=90)
